strategies.label: Block all public snapshot sharing

dependency_checks.message: Confirm no workflows depend on public snapshot sharing before enforcement.

warnings: Existing workflows that rely on public snapshot sharing may fail.
strategies.impact_text: Public access to EBS snapshots will be blocked at the account level.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'snapshot_block_all_sharing' for strategy 'snapshot_block_all_sharing'.

strategies.label: Block new public sharing only

dependency_checks.message: Confirm no workflows depend on public snapshot sharing before enforcement.
Existing public snapshot shares may remain and need separate cleanup.

warnings: Previously shared public snapshots may remain exposed.
strategies.impact_text: New public sharing for EBS snapshots will be blocked while previously public snapshots remain unchanged.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'snapshot_block_new_sharing_only' for strategy 'snapshot_block_new_sharing_only'.

strategies.label: Keep public sharing (exception path)

fields.description: How long should this exception remain active?
Why can't you apply this fix right now?
fields.placeholder: Describe the temporary business or operational constraint.

dependency_checks.message: Public snapshot sharing can expose sensitive data and AMI lineage.

warnings: Public snapshots can leak data and AMI lineage.
strategies.impact_text: Public EBS snapshot sharing posture will remain unchanged while the exception path is active.
strategies.decision_rationale: Wave 2 compatibility defaulted to the single compatible profile 'snapshot_keep_sharing_exception' for strategy 'snapshot_keep_sharing_exception'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_high__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'exception_review'. Risk is high and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.80, privilege_level=0.00, internet_exposure=1.00, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is complete enough for advisory matrix placement.
